title: Action Jackson
subTitle: After falling in love with a clumsy girl, a small-time goon comes in contact with his doppelgänger, AJ, before setting off on a romantic journey with his ladylove.

title: Radha Krishna Prem Pariksha
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Phir Ek Maidan E Jung
subTitle: When rival gang members are killed mysteriously, the police begin an investigation. Later, their probe leads them to a physician who is seeking retribution.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Panga
subTitle: Jaya, a former Kabaddi world champion, is pushed into making a comeback into the sport by her family. However, she first has to battle her internal conflicts and the expectations society has of her.

title: Hulchul
subTitle: A man and a woman come from two feuding families and pretend to be in love for revenge. Their plan goes awry when they fall in love and they must work on bringing together their families.

title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham ...
subTitle: Rahul, the adopted older son of a rich couple, is banished by his father when he chooses to marry a middle-class woman. Years later, his younger brother, Rohan, sets out to find him.

title: Mirai
subTitle: When a vicious villain sets out to claim nine sacred books that hold the secret to immortality, the guardian of the ninth book ties a happy-go-lucky orphan's destiny to the quest to protect them.

title: Kuch Kuch Hota Hai
subTitle: After reading the letter her mother had written for her before she died, Anjali decides to bring together her widowed father, Rahul, with his true love who is also named Anjali.

title: Housefull 4
subTitle: Three brothers are set to marry three sisters. However, a peek into the distant past reveals to one of the brothers that their brides have been mixed up in their current reincarnation.

title: Double Attack
subTitle: Siddharth and Charan, two lookalikes who are fighting their own battles against evildoers, cross paths and join forces to take down Rawat, a ruthless minister.

title: Double Attack
subTitle: Siddharth and Charan, two lookalikes who are fighting their own battles against evildoers, cross paths and join forces to take down Rawat, a ruthless minister.

title: Made in China
subTitle: Raghuveer Mehta, a failing businessman, travels to China for some work. During the trip, he hatches a plan to sell an aphrodisiac that enhances men's sexual health in India.

title: E
subTitle: E, an orphan who lives in the slums, will do anything to earn money. However, this quality gets entrapped in Dr Ramakrishnan's evil plans.

title: Star Gold HD
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Sheesha
subTitle: Sia leaves her twin sister Ria in Raj's care while she travels abroad, but on returning, she uncovers troubling changes that raise questions about loyalty and trust.

title: Boss
subTitle: Disowned by his father as a boy, Surya seeks protection from a crime boss. When his brother is wrongfully sent to prison, his father begs him to intervene.

title: Satyabhama
subTitle: ACP Satyabhama embarks on an investigation into a missing person case, which leads her to uncover dark secrets hidden within the town. However, as she delves deeper, her past begins to haunt her.

title: ABCD 2
subTitle: Suresh and Vinnie are childhood friends who are passionate about dancing. They form a dance group but face many hurdles to participate in the Las Vegas dancing competition.

title: Salaar Part 1: Ceasefire
subTitle: Just when the prince of Khansaar is about to rise to the throne, a plan of overthrowing him is exercised and only one man can help him retrieve power.

title: Coolie The Powerhouse
subTitle: Deva, a former gold smuggler, seeks to regain his past glory by reviving his old gang with stolen technology hidden in vintage golden watches, leading to unintended consequences.

title: The Big Bull
subTitle: Hemant Shah, a sharp-witted stockbroker, manipulates the system and goes from rags to riches in no time. Before long, journalist Meera starts digging into his activities.

title: Kuberaa
subTitle: Following a tycoon's discovery of a rare oil reserve, a compassionate beggar gets trapped in the dangerous mechanisms of his rapacious scheme.

title: Kuberaa
subTitle: Following a tycoon's discovery of a rare oil reserve, a compassionate beggar gets trapped in the dangerous mechanisms of his rapacious scheme.

title: Ab Ke Baras
subTitle: Anjali comes to India to investigate recurring visions of her past life in her dreams. Later, she meets a thief who might have been her lover in another lifetime.

title: Filler
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Aisha
subTitle: Aisha, who enjoys playing Cupid despite her friend Arjun's disapproval, finds a new target, Shefali. However, her meddling ultimately damages her own relationships with close friends.

title: Badhaai Ho
subTitle: Nakul, a 25-year-old man, is shocked to discover that his mother is pregnant. His struggle to come to terms with the news puts his relationship with his girlfriend in jeopardy.

title: Kaabil
subTitle: Rohan, a visually impaired man, marries Supriya, the love of his life. Their happiness is tarnished when Supriya commits suicide after being raped by influential bandits.

title: Chhichhore
subTitle: A tragic incident forces Anirudh, a middle-aged man, to take a trip down memory lane and reminisce his college days along with his friends, who were labelled as losers.

title: Laxmii
subTitle: Asif's belief in logic and science is shattered when the ghost possesses him and supernatural forces begin to take over his house.

title: Taqdeer
subTitle: Soon after Avinash manages to get the phone number of his childhood love Priya, his phone gets stolen by a gangster. So, he sets out on a dangerous chase in order to reconcile with his lover.

title: The Warriorr
subTitle: Satya, a doctor, is brutally beaten and driven out of his city by Guru, a ruthless gangster. However, Satya returns two years later as a police officer to exact revenge on Guru.

title: Bhagavanth Kesari
subTitle: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.

title: Inspector Vijay
subTitle: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.
